login.title: ⚖️ Judgie-AI Login
login.subtitle: Welcome to the AI-powered Project Evaluation Platform. Please log in.
login.no_projects: No projects available yet. Please ask your super admin.
login.demo_subtitle: Try Judgie-AI immediately without credentials or Gemini API keys. Safe read-only mode.

leaderboard.title: 🔥 The Hype Board
leaderboard.subtitle: Overview of the project heat and team rankings.
leaderboard.jury_subtitle: This expert panel will evaluate your submissions.

team.title: Team Dashboard
team.upload_hint: Drag & drop or click to upload your ZIP, PDF, MP4, or MOV files.
team.zip_hint_title: 💡 Tips for ZIP creation (to avoid size limits)
team.zip_hint_desc: If your project includes large directories like `node_modules`, `.git`, or `venv`, please exclude them before zipping to avoid hitting the 200MB upload limit and AI context limits.
team.api_limit_error: Gemini API rate limit reached (token quota exceeded). Please wait a moment and try again, or configure a paid API key in system settings. Alternatively, reduce the size of your ZIP file by excluding unnecessary directories.

admin.title: ⚡ Command Center
admin.import_template_desc: Initialize hackathon configuration from presets or a JSON template URL.
admin.import_preset_confirm: Are you sure you want to apply this template? It will overwrite your current evaluation criteria and judges configuration.
